title: calonemorchis cristata
intro: Calonemorchis cristata, commonly known as the crested Calonema or crested Calanthe, is a type of orchid plant. This epiphytic plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of Calonemorchis cristata are attributed to its ability to modulate the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
